The '''Kaminoan resistance''' was a rebellion movement on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] in [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]].

==History==
===Establishment===
A number of [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoans]], known only as the [[Clone Master/Legends|Clone Masters]], resisted the growing rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and formed an armed rebellion against it

The Clone Masters still had vials of [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett's]] DNA used to grow the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] from the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and grew a new army of clones, which would be known as [[Anti-trooper]]s. Donning [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase I clone trooper armor]], this army comprised [[Clone jet trooper/Legends|Clone jet troopers]] and [[Rail-class Advanced Recon Commando|''Rail''-class ARC commandos]].

===The uprising===
{{Main|Kamino uprising}}
The resistance made an attempt at attacking the Empire. In response, a special detachment of the Imperial [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] were deployed into [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City]] on Kamino. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] hired [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to lead the invasion. Tipoca City was his home city, and he knew the complex very well.

In the ensuing conflict, the new cloning program was shut down, and the Clone Masters were shot out of the sky while fleeing in [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|Low Altitude Assault Transport]] transports.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' {{1st}}
